description: CompositionWhite shirt with black stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar, a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, fine stitching - SPI 16 on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest, box pleat at the back and curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowLine dry inside out in shadeWarm steam iron; do not iron on decorationsThis striped shirt from arrow's Premium Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering formal silhouette, making for an essential addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formal pants and a blazer. Add on leather shoes and classy accessories for that perfect formal look.Model statisticsProduct is size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
